name: fv-uikit-sync-agent
description: Repo-local agent for syncing the latest fv_uikit_flutter package changes into this docs web repo without modifying the source package.

interface.shortDescription: Sync fv_uikit_flutter changes into this docs repo
interface.longDescription: Compares the source fv_uikit_flutter package with the local copy inside this repository, applies relevant updates into the docs repo, and keeps docs, examples, and tests aligned without writing back to the source package.
defaultPrompt: Sync the latest fv_uikit_flutter changes into this docs repo
Compare the source package and update local docs integration
Refresh package copy and docs examples from fv_uikit_flutter
